steps.title: Use the y-intercept to find b
steps.content: For a linear function, substituting $h(0) = 41$ directly gives the y-intercept: $b = 41$.

steps.title: Use the second point to find slope m
steps.content:
With $b = 41$, we have $h(x) = mx + 41$. Using $h(1) = 40$:
$$40 = m(1) + 41$$
$$m = -1$$
Therefore $h(x) = -x + 41$. That matches choice A — A is correct.
